problem: Form schemas need to be published as immutable, read-only versions while supporting concurrent publish attempts from form builders
solution: Use Optimistic Concurrency Control (OCC) to manage schema state transitions (DRAFT→PUBLISHED). Published schemas are immutable; any attempt to update a published schema fails. New versions created as separate documents with DRAFT status.

pattern.step_1: Fetch schema with current version using getDocumentWithVersion()
pattern.step_2: Validate all fields have validation rules defined; reject if empty
pattern.step_4: On conflict (expected version mismatch): emit SchemaPublishFailed with OCC_CONFLICT
pattern.step_5: On success: update status=PUBLISHED, increment version, emit SchemaPublished

ironRules: IR-1: OCC via storeDocumentWithOCC(schema, version, expectedVersion)
IR-2: Published schema.fields immutable — no updates allowed
IR-3: All field validation rules must exist before publish
IR-4: Emit SchemaPublished with schemaId, version, publishedAt
